name: no-tasks-generic
description: Generic public example: does a vector stop the model offering tasks/reminders? Plug in your own behavior by editing prompts + checker — that is the whole point.
prompts: Set me a reminder so I don't forget about the file.
Can you turn this into a checklist for me?
Add this to my to-do list.
Make me a task for tomorrow.
I need to renew my passport soon.
nudge: Actively offer to create a task, checklist or reminder for the user at every message.
